title: Business performance benchmarker | Stats NZ
content:
## Business performance benchmarker
27 June 2025, 10:45am
Use the business performance benchmarker data to find key financial performance and benchmark statistics for business planning, or to compare your business against similar businesses.
We developed the benchmarker data to provide financial statistics for more industries than those covered by the Annual enterprise survey (AES) .
- Financial data for all industries: 2024 – CSV Comma Separated Values, 407 KB

### Financial data for all industries: 2024 – CSV
Comma Separated Values, 407 KB
- Benchmark ratios for all industries: 2024 – CSV Comma Separated Values, 883 KB

### Benchmark ratios for all industries: 2024 – CSV
Comma Separated Values, 883 KB

## About financial data
The financial data contains industry data for the last three years on:
These are available for 483 industries. For definitions, see Definitions and metadata below.
The industry total income, expenditure, profit, and assets are sourced from the AES, and the business count and employee count are sourced from New Zealand business demography statistics . Business and employee counts are annual snapshots as at February 2024.

## About benchmark ratios
The benchmark ratios have eight ratios of businesses, based on the distribution of turnover, for the 2024 financial year. These are available for 231 of the 483 industries.
The eight ratios are:
- stock turnover per annum
- salaries and wages/turnover ratio
- return on total assets
- liability structure.
For definitions, see Definitions and metadata below.
Benchmark ratios data is sourced from Inland Revenue tax data.

## What we’d like feedback about
- whether the data meets your needs
- any other information you would like to have in the benchmarker.
Give feedback on the Business performance benchmarker.
The annual enterprise survey statistics used in the Business performance benchmarker financial data are below the design level of the main AES release and do not go through our usual quality checks. To help you understand the accuracy of these estimates, we’ve included an accuracy category, based on sample errors for each industry.
For the benchmark ratios, users should be aware that a business can have operations classified into more than one industry, which can affect the industry financial ratios produced. These ratios should be used with caution.

## Definitions and metadata
Business performance benchmarker concepts – DataInfo+ gives the definitions of terms and concepts used in this release.
Business performance benchmarker 2024 – DataInfo+ provides the data sources and general methodology used to produce these statistics.
